LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_Thrumbo.label: Spark Resonance
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_Thrumbo.description: Feels her best friend "Spark" nearby. Her rampaging genes calm at that warm core radiation.
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_Spark.label: Guardian Resonance
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_Spark.description: Soul link with Prototype #0. As long as #0 is nearby, Spark gains superhuman reflexes and regeneration.
